---
title: "R vs SAS - Sample size for superiority studies"
---

### Summary of R vs SAS Comparison for Sample size for superiority studies {.unnumbered}

For the superiority single timepoint analysis (both paired and cross-over design), functions available in R packages `samplesize`, `stats`, and `pwr`, and `PROC POWER` in SAS have been found to 100% agree.

| Analysis    | Supported in R                        | Supported in SAS                        | Results Match | Notes |
|---------------|---------------|---------------|---------------|---------------|
| Sample size | [Yes](../R/sample_s_superiority.html) | [Yes](../SAS/sample_s_superiority.html) | Yes           |       |
